articles.title: McDonald’s Laces Up with Basketball Star Devin Booker to Debut the Nike Book 2 McDonald’s Sneaker
articles.summary: McDonald's is collaborating with NBA star Devin Booker to launch the limited-edition Nike Book 2 McDonald's sneaker. These sneakers, inspired by Booker's Arizona roots and a unique McDonald's location with turquoise arches in Sedona, will be available in two colorways. Fans can enter a sweepstakes via the McDonald's app for a Friends & Family edition or purchase a general release version on Nike.com starting June 2.
